chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1088 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of CMA No.4474/2025 (S/A). 3. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General along with Inspector Tarique Manzoor Soomro, on behalf of SSP Sukkur and SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto, on behalf of DIGP Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- AAG files comments on behalf of Inspector General of Police Sindh, same is taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The comments reflect that the meeting of Sindh Police Recruitment Board held on 26.11.2024 and the Board has recommended to reject the case and withdrawn the selection of the petitioner. After such statement, counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that he will challenge the decision of Board. Under instruction instant petitions is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
